englishDefinition: a piece of work given by a teacher
chineseTranslation: 作業；老師指定要完成的工作

englishDefinition: the latest time when work must be finished
chineseTranslation: 截止期限；工作最晚必須完成的時間

englishDefinition: a plan showing times for activities
chineseTranslation: 時間表；顯示活動時間的安排

englishDefinition: free or ready to be used
to go to a class meeting or event
chineseTranslation: 出席；參加課程會議或活動

englishDefinition: to give work to a teacher for review
chineseTranslation: 繳交；把作業交給老師評閱

englishDefinition: to officially join a class or event
chineseTranslation: 註冊；正式加入課程或活動

englishDefinition: the buildings and land of a college
chineseTranslation: 校園；大學的建築與土地

englishDefinition: a talk that teaches an academic subject
chineseTranslation: 講課；教授學術主題的演講

englishDefinition: an arranged time to meet someone
chineseTranslation: 預約；安排好與某人見面的時間

englishDefinition: State a choice and reason; I prefer mornings because I can focus.
Answer a choice question directly; I would choose the first option.
chineseTranslation: 直接回答選擇題；我會選擇……

englishDefinition: Introduce one clear reason for your answer
chineseTranslation: 提出支持答案的一個清楚理由

englishDefinition: Introduce a short personal example for an interview answer
chineseTranslation: 用簡短的個人經驗支持訪談回答

englishDefinition: Ask politely to hear something again
Explain the same idea in a clearer way
chineseTranslation: 換句話說；用更清楚的方式重述想法
